if.test: period != null and period != '' and period != 'all'

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalClothings, COUNT(DISTINCT wear_log.clothing_id) AS totalWorn, SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(wear_log.clothing_id ORDER BY wear_log.wear_count DESC, wear_log.clothing_id ASC), ',', 1 ) AS mostWornClothingId, MAX(wear_log.wear_count) AS mostWornCount FROM clothings c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT clothing_id, COUNT(*) AS wear_count FROM clothing_wear_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId}
GROUP BY clothing_id ) wear_log ON c.id = wear_log.clothing_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0

SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND( (COUNT(*) * 100.0) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clothings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), 0), 2 ) AS percentage FROM clothings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY category

SELECT primary_color AS color, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND( (COUNT(*) * 100.0) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clothings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), 0), 2 ) AS percentage FROM clothings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY primary_color

SELECT frequency_level AS level, CASE frequency_level WHEN 1 THEN '很少' WHEN 2 THEN '较少' WHEN 3 THEN '一般' WHEN 4 THEN '较多' WHEN 5 THEN '经常' ELSE '未知' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM clothings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY frequency_level

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(worn_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM clothing_wear_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(worn_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
